biome_observations.surface_debris: Presence of white, fragmented material (resembling crushed eggshells or mineral deposits) in the black pot. No fungal growth observed.

temporal_deltas.t5_to_current: The sprout observed in the earliest image has undergone total senescence or removal. The biome is now entirely devoid of living plant matter.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total biological collapse. There are no living specimens to assess; the environment is effectively a sterile soil-based setup.
anomalies: Disappearance of the White Rabbit scale anchor.
Presence of white particulate matter (likely calcium carbonate/eggshells) in the black pot.
vision_report.narrative_description: Upon meticulous audit of the provided chronological sequence, I have determined that the biome has suffered a complete systemic loss of all registered botanical specimens. The earliest image captured a single, fragile sprout in the black pot, which has since vanished. The current state of the desk reveals only empty pots containing soil and mineral-like debris. There is no evidence of the expected Pothos, Mexican Mint, or String of Nickels. The environment is currently non-viable for the listed species.
